description_long: This modern house features a flat roof and a geometric, rectilinear design with clean lines and a mix of materials, including concrete, glass, and wood. The property is surrounded by a white perimeter wall and is bordered by rows of mature trees, providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. The front facade includes a combination of large windows and solid wall sections, with a prominent entryway sheltered by an overhang. The backyard boasts a swimming pool, a wooden deck, and a circular outdoor seating area, creating ample space for relaxation and entertainment. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back and featuring rooftop terraces. The overall layout is open and spacious, with landscaped green areas and paved walkways connecting different zones.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of concrete, glass, and wood, surrounded by trees and featuring a pool and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: The house is seen from the street side, with a row of trees obscuring much of the facade and the entryway partially visible behind the foliage.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the driveway, street, and the side of the house, revealing the pool, backyard, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_2: The rear of the house is visible, showcasing the pool, wooden deck, and circular seating area, as well as the upper terrace and landscaping.
description_view_3: A view from the opposite street side, showing the driveway, entryway, and the arrangement of trees along the perimeter, with the pool and backyard visible to the left.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a flat overhang, wide steps, and a minimalist door set back from the facade, partially screened by landscaping.
